phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso di Villa Monastero, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-soh dee VEEL-lah moh-nah-STEH-roh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Along the lake, near the garden.

responses.english: Along the lake, near the garden.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto d'ingresso, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah eel bee-lyet-toh deen-GRES-soh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si possono fare foto dentro, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see POS-soh-noh FAH-reh FOH-toh DEN-troh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'imbarcadero dei traghetti, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH leem-bar-kah-DEH-roh day tra-GHET-tee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Here at the lake, straight ahead.

responses.english: Here at the lake, straight ahead.
